description_for_human: Communications operations for Nebula Forge station — message routing, signal relay management, deep-space transmissions, and communication logs.
description_for_model: This plugin manages all communications operations aboard Nebula Forge station. It can list and filter messages, send station-wide broadcasts, check communication relay status, schedule deep-space transmissions, and retrieve communication logs. Use it whenever a user asks about messages, relay status, broadcasts, transmissions, or communication history.

functions.name: get_messages
functions.description: List communication messages. Optionally filter by channel or priority.

functions.name: send_broadcast
functions.description: Send a station-wide broadcast message to all personnel. Creates a message with channel 'internal' and addressed to ALL-STATION.

from.description: Sender name or role (e.g. 'Cdr. Elena Vasquez')

functions.name: check_signal_status
functions.description: Check the status of communication relay stations. Provide a relayId for a specific relay, or omit to get the status of all relays.

relayId.description: Relay ID (e.g. RELAY-001) for a specific relay

functions.name: schedule_transmission
functions.description: Schedule a deep-space transmission. Automatically calculates the relay path based on available online relays.

targetStation.description: Name of the target station or outpost

functions.name: get_comm_logs
functions.description: Get communication logs. Optionally filter by date range or channel.

startDate.description: Start date for filtering (ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2287-03-15)

endDate.description: End date for filtering (ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2287-03-16)
